title: Unit 0208 Models
wikitext:
[]: Unit 02+08 [Models]             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Oct 01, 2013 10:41 pm Not sure where this goes, so I'll just put it in the Rebuild forum for good measure. I mean, technically it's from 3.0, but it could also mean that what was seen in the Preview might be there to stay in FINAL. Unit 02+08 Models to hit store shelves. Odd, since it's the first time in Eva I can recall official merchandising being made from a few shots in the preview. (I guess eye-patch Asuka from 2.22's preview might count as an example, but I forget if those models came out before or after the release date for Q was announced.)

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Oct 01, 2013 10:47 pm The funniest part is seeing someone diss Q as early as the second comment .

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Tue Oct 01, 2013 11:15 pm God it's so fucking ugly who would want to waste their money on that repugnant design.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Tue Oct 01, 2013 11:57 pm It'll be worth it if Asuka has to sit in Mari's lap to pilot it. Also it should flip coins before it goes into beast mode or whatever.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Oct 02, 2013 12:18 am I'll have a little giggle at all the people who buy that when the film comes out in two years and Unit 02+08 looks nothing like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Wed Oct 02, 2013 12:25 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: I'll have a little giggle at all the people who buy that when the film comes out in two years and Unit 02+08 looks nothing like that.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Wed Oct 02, 2013 12:31 am I'll just say this: The post-credit scene made me not want to watch Final. 02+08 battling MP Evas on a CGI red and totally uninteresting red earth? I.... might have to pass. And puke.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Wed Oct 02, 2013 3:30 am monitoradiation wrote: I'll just say this: The post-credit scene made me not want to watch Final. 02+08 battling MP Evas on a CGI red and totally uninteresting red earth? I.... might have to pass. And puke.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Oct 02, 2013 3:38 am There was already a talk about this in the Eva figurines thread, apparently that will be a collector figure sold in limited quantities. Personally now that I think about it, releasing that model was a smart move : it's very easy to create(take an EVA-08 model, paint the left halt at EVA-02 colors, cut the left half of the head to graft the one from EVA-02, and voilà ! And since it's the left side of the head they can even use the old EVA-02 head from the 2.0 models! Easy and cost-efficient!), released in very limited quantities to make it a collector item, and they added a RS Hopper and the ANIMA Magorox to attract those who want the accessories for their other figures! Maximum profits, minimum costs and risks!

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed Oct 02, 2013 5:34 am I can't believe that they actually made that thing. Easy money for them, i guess. #Evamilkingcow

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Oct 02, 2013 6:55 am And I was joking that it will never appear like that in FINAL because no one would want to sell and buy that monstrosity! At least they are honest in the name : “Revoltech Yamaguchi No. EX Evangelion Unit-08+02 Evangelion: 3.0 Preview Ver. ” Even they doubt that it will make it to the final version of the movie!

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Oct 02, 2013 8:04 am ^Thank god that's not the finalised design.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Oct 02, 2013 8:15 am All you haters will fall in love with it once the movie comes out and it's actually in there. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed Oct 02, 2013 12:06 pm Okay, not gonna lie:THAT looks pretty damn sweet. : O Much better than the original.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Wed Oct 02, 2013 3:23 pm Th3Marauder wrote: I can't quite tell if you're being serious, but the preview was what, 45 seconds, of a movie that probably hadn't even entered production at that point? Give it some time.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Oct 02, 2013 4:56 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: All you haters will fall in love with it once the movie comes out and it's actually in there. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Wed Oct 02, 2013 8:23 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: All you haters will fall in love with it once the movie comes out and it's actually in there. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Wed Oct 02, 2013 10:48 pm monitoradiation wrote: I'm half serious. On the one hand i know its not final, but that it made it into an official post-credit sequence does lend some credence to it as a preview of things to come. Im just saying that on prima facie level, what the post credit scene showed makes me scared for final.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Wed Oct 02, 2013 11:55 pm Th3Marauder wrote: ... But it won't be 2 hours of them just running across the red earth fighting MPEs. More is going to happen.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Oct 03, 2013 3:17 am Q? Shonen? Where did you got that feeling?
summary: []: Unit 02+08 [Models]             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Oct 01, 2013 10:41 pm Not sure where this goes, so I'll just put it in the Rebuild forum for good measure. I mean, technically it's from 3.0, but it could also mean that what was seen in the Preview might be there to stay in FINAL. Unit 02+08 Models to hit store shelves. Odd, since it's the first time in Eva I can recall official merchandising being made
